https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-trace.title: MPLP Trace Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-trace.description: Trace Module Core Protocol: Describes the minimal required semantics (Core Profile) for execution trace resources (Trace) and their key segments and events.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-role..title: MPLP Role Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-role..description: Role Module Core Protocol: Describes the minimal required semantics (Core Profile) for capability declarations, permission declarations, and behavioral identity models in multi-agent systems.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-plan..title: MPLP Plan Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-plan..description: Plan Module Core Protocol: Describes the plan objects and their lifecycle minimal required semantics (Core Profile) in multi-agent collaboration.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-netwo.title: MPLP Network Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-netwo.description: Network Module Core Protocol: Describes the minimal required semantics (Core Profile) for the topology and node collection of a multi-agent collaboration network.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-exten.title: MPLP Extension Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-exten.description: Extension Module Core Protocol: Describes the minimal required semantics (Core Profile) for the MPLP plugin system, capability injection, and protocol enhancement points.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-dialo.title: MPLP Dialog Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-dialo.description: Dialog Module Core Protocol: Describes the dialog interaction semantics in multi-agent systems, adopting Minimal Protocol Format aligned with OpenAI/Anthropic standards.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-core..title: MPLP Core Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-core..description: Core Module Core Protocol: Describes the minimal required semantics (Core Profile) for an MPLP protocol instance's version, enabled modules, and overall state.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-conte.title: MPLP Context Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-conte.description: Context Module Core Protocol: Describes the context resources and their minimal required semantics (Core Profile) for a multi-agent collaboration project/session.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-confi.title: MPLP Confirm Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-confi.description: Confirm Module Core Protocol: Describes the minimal required semantics (Core Profile) for approval requests and decision records.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-colla.title: MPLP Collab Module – Core Protocol v1.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/mplp-colla.description: Collab Module Core Protocol: Describes the minimal required semantics (Core Profile) for multi-agent / multi-role collaboration sessions.

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/learning/m.title: MPLP LearningSample – Intent Resolution v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/learning/m.description: Specialized schema for intent_resolution samples capturing user intent clarification and plan generation

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/learning/m.title: MPLP LearningSample – Delta Impact v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/learning/m.description: Specialized schema for delta_impact samples capturing change effect analysis and compensation planning

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/learning/m.title: MPLP LearningSample Core v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/learning/m.description: Core structure for MPLP LearningSample entities - defines the universal format for learning samples generated from execution history

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/integratio.title: MPLP Tool Event v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/integratio.description: External tool invocation and results (formatters, linters, test runners, generators)

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/integratio.title: MPLP File Update Event v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/integratio.description: IDE file changes (save, refactor, batch modify)

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.title: MPLP SA Event v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.description: Events emitted by a Single Agent (SA) execution in MPLP v1.0 protocol

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.title: MPLP RuntimeExecutionEvent v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.description: Runtime execution lifecycle events (agents, tools, LLMs, workers)

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.title: MPLP PipelineStageEvent v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.description: **REQUIRED** - Pipeline stage transition events (MANDATORY for v1.0 compliance)

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.title: MPLP MAP Event v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.description: Events emitted by Multi-Agent Profile (MAP) collaboration sessions in MPLP v1.0 protocol

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.title: MPLP GraphUpdateEvent v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.description: **REQUIRED** - PSG structural update events (MANDATORY for v1.0 compliance)

https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.title: MPLP Core Event v1.0
https://mplp.dev/schemas/v1.0/events/mpl.description: Base structure for MPLP observability events - provides common fields inherited by all event families

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/tra.title: MPLP Trace Base
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/tra.description: Common base fields for Trace / Span structures. Designed based on W3C Trace Context standard, providing a unified tracing context for the MPLP execution chain. Supports distributed tracing and parent-child relationships of execution steps.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/met.title: MPLP Metadata
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/met.description: Common metadata structure for all MPLP objects. Provides version control, creation info, tags, and cross-cutting concern declarations. All top-level objects in L2/L3/L4 should include the meta field.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/lea.title: MPLP Learning Sample – Schema v2.0
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/lea.description: Structured learning sample for MPLP v1.0 runtimes.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/ide.title: MPLP Identifier
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/ide.description: Unified identifier type used for contextId/planId/traceId/eventId, etc. Uses UUID v4 standard to ensure global uniqueness and collision-free generation in distributed environments.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/eve.title: MPLP Base Event
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/eve.description: Base model for all event structures in MPLP. Designed based on CloudEvents v1.0 core fields, providing unified event identification, type, source, and timestamp. ExecutionEvent, StateTransitionEvent, etc., are extensions of this.

https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/com.title: MPLP Common Types
https://schemas.mplp.dev/v1.0/common/com.description: Common type definitions used across MPLP modules to ensure consistency and reduce duplication.
